brand_dna.category: Handmade natural gemstone jewelry - bracelets, necklaces, meditation malas, earrings and keychains sold direct to consumer.
brand_dna.core_belief: Jewelry should feel personal, meaningful, and easy to wear every day.
proof_points: Handmade gemstone jewelry, including meditation malas and stretch bracelets
Free shipping in the USA for orders over $50
Carbon-neutral shipping on all orders via verified carbon removal credits
4.95 star customer rating across 64 reviews shown on site
brand_dna.positioning: Accessible, meaning-driven natural gemstone jewelry at approachable price points ($26-$38), leaning warm and personal rather than luxury or trend-loud.

voice_pillars.name: Personal & Meaningful
voice_pillars.desc: Frames every piece as something intimate and significant to the wearer, not just an accessory.
voice_pillars.quote: jewelry should feel personal, meaningful, and easy to wear every day

voice_pillars.name: Warm & Approachable
voice_pillars.desc: Speaks like a friendly maker who is genuinely reachable and eager to help.
voice_pillars.quote: We are always happy to help.

voice_pillars.name: Community-Minded
voice_pillars.desc: Invites customers into a named family and shared mission rather than a transaction.

voice_pillars.name: Quietly Responsible
voice_pillars.desc: Owns its environmental impact plainly and without preaching.

phrases: personal, meaningful, and easy to wear every day

icp: Spiritually-curious women who love natural gemstones and want handmade, affordable everyday jewelry that carries personal meaning and reflects their values, including sustainability.

personas.name: Mindful Wellness Seeker
personas.description: Practices meditation and journaling and buys malas and point necklaces framed as intention-setting companions for daily calm and focus.

personas.name: Gemstone Collector
personas.description: Loves the look and lore of natural stones and is moved by the origin, uniqueness, and handmade craftsmanship of each piece.

personas.name: Values-Driven Gifter
personas.description: Buys meaningful, budget-friendly gifts and is reassured by carbon-neutral shipping and the maker-run, community feel of the brand.

allowed.claim: Handmade natural gemstone jewelry, malas and bracelets
Free shipping in the USA for orders over $50
Carbon-neutral shipping on all orders via verified carbon removal credits
Custom jewelry, repairs and DIY bracelet kits available

banned.claim: Gemstones heal, cure, or treat any physical or mental condition
banned.why: Alters structure/function claim - would make jewelry an unapproved drug/medical device under cosmetic/health rules.

banned.claim: Rose Quartz or any stone reduces anxiety, balances hormones, or relieves pain
banned.why: Structure/function health claim; not supported and prohibited without approval.
'Clinically proven' requires an actual study; no study exists in the input.

banned.claim: Stones repair or restore your body's energy or immune system
banned.why: Repair/restore body function claim - crosses from adornment into unapproved therapeutic claim.

banned.claim: Amazonite or Citrine boosts your health or metabolism
banned.why: Unqualified structure/function health claim with no substantiation.
FTC Green Guides - unqualified blanket sustainability claim; only carbon-neutral shipping is substantiated.
